text: R, run:
code: devtools::document() pkgdown::build_site() pkgdown::build_article("<article name>")

title: Authors and Citation
text: Michael Barkasi. Maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Barkasi M (2026). neurons: Framework Neuron Modelling, Simulation, Analysis. R package version 1.0.
code: @Manual{,   title = {neurons: A Framework for Neuron Modelling, Simulation, and Analysis},   author = {Michael Barkasi},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 1.0}, }

what: A Framework for Neuron Modelling, Simulation, and Analysis
title: A Framework for Neuron Modelling, Simulation, and Analysis
text: Neurons R/C++ package simulating neurons networks neurons, currently development Oviedo Lab. package built around core object classes, C++ class accessible R via Rcpp modules wrappers. neuron: modeling spiking single neurons dichotomized Gaussians. network: simulating spiking neural networks Growth-transform dynamical systems. motif: specifying general patterns connectivity neurons circuit, .e., “circuit motif” “network topology”.  Copyright (C) 2025, Michael Barkasi barkasi@wustl.edu

title: Add new cell type — add.cell.type
text: function adds user-defined cell type current session. just wrapper Rcpp-exported add_cell_type function. Technically, cell_type struc defined Rcpp backend neurons package. essentially labeled lists following entries: type_name, valence, temporal_modulation_bias, temporal_modulation_timeconstant, temporal_modulation_amplitude, transmission_velocity, v_bound, dHdv_bound, I_spike, coupling_scaling_factor, spike_potential, resting_potential, threshold. session stores cell types Rcpp backend unordered_map string labels. parameters come biologically realistic (mathematically workable) default values, except type_name valence.

title: Add new cell type — add.cell.type
code: add.cell.type(   type_name,   valence,   temporal_modulation_bias = 0.001,   temporal_modulation_timeconstant = 1,   temporal_modulation_amplitude = 0.005,   transmission_velocity = 30000,   v_bound = 85,   dHdv_bound = 1.05e-06,   I_spike = 1e-06,   coupling_scaling_factor = 1e-07,   spike_potential = 35,   resting_potential = -70,   threshold = -55 )

title: Add new cell type — add.cell.type
text: type_name Character string giving name cell type, e.g. "excitatory", "inhibitory", "PV", "SST", etc. valence Valence neuron type, +1 excitatory, -1 inhibitory temporal_modulation_bias Temporal modulation time (ms) bias neuron type. Default value 1e-3. temporal_modulation_timeconstant Temporal modulation time (ms) step neuron type. Default value 1e0. temporal_modulation_amplitude Temporal modulation time (ms) cutoff neuron type. Default value 5e-3. transmission_velocity Transmission velocity (microns/ms) neuron type. Default value 30e3. v_bound Potential bound, -v_bound <= v_traces <= v_bound, unit_potential (mV), neuron network, based type. Default value 85.0. dHdv_bound Bound derivative metabolic energy wrt potential, dHdv_bound > abs(dHdv), mA, neuron network, based type. Default value 1.05e-6. I_spike Spike current, mA. Default value 1e-6 (.e., 1 nA). coupling_scaling_factor Controls energy used synaptic transmission compares used spiking. Default value 1e-7, meaning synaptic transmission uses 0.00001 percent energy used spiking. spike_potential Magnitude spike, mV. Default value 35.0. resting_potential Resting potential, mV. Default value -70.0. threshold Spike threshold, mV. Default value -55.0.

title: Add new cell type — add.cell.type
text: Nothing.

what: Function to analyze autocorrelation estimates with bootstrapping — analyze.autocorr
title: Function to analyze autocorrelation estimates with bootstrapping — analyze.autocorr
text: function takes output estimate.autocorr.params performs bootstrap analysis estimate distribution mean time constant (tau) different levels specified covariates.

title: Function to analyze autocorrelation estimates with bootstrapping — analyze.autocorr
code: analyze.autocorr(ests, covariate, n_bs = 10000)

title: Function to analyze autocorrelation estimates with bootstrapping — analyze.autocorr
text: ests Output estimate.autocorr.params, list outputs. covariate Character string vector character strings specifying covariate(s) analyze (e.g., "hemi"). n_bs Number bootstrap resamples perform (default: 1e4).

title: Function to analyze autocorrelation estimates with bootstrapping — analyze.autocorr
text: list two elements: resamples data frame bootstrap resamples mean tau combination covariate levels distribution_plot ggplot object showing distribution mean tau combination covariate levels

title: Apply circuit motif to network — apply.circuit.motif
text: network Network object motif applied. motif Motif object defining circuit motif apply.

what: Compute autocorrelation of single neuron object — compute.autocorr
title: Compute autocorrelation of single neuron object — compute.autocorr
text: function computes autocorrelation single neuron object using specified parameters. wrapper around compute_autocorrelation method neuron class.

title: Compute autocorrelation of single neuron object — compute.autocorr
code: compute.autocorr(nrn, bin_count_action = "sum", max_lag = 0, use_raw = TRUE)

title: Compute autocorrelation of single neuron object — compute.autocorr
text: nrn Neuron object compute autocorrelation. bin_count_action Method counting spikes bin computing autocorrelation; one "boolean", "mean", "sum" (default: "sum"). max_lag Maximum lag (units trial data) compute autocorrelation; 0, uses number time bins neuron's trial data (default: 0). use_raw Logical indicating whether use raw autocorrelation (true) standard centered normalized correlation (false) (default: TRUE).

title: Compute autocorrelation of single neuron object — compute.autocorr
text: None. Modifies neuron place.

what: Function to estimate autocorrelation parameters using dichotomized Gaussian simulations — estimate.autocorr.params
title: Function to estimate autocorrelation parameters using dichotomized Gaussian simulations — estimate.autocorr.params
text: function performs estimate--fit procedure process.autocorr, multiple times neuron using simulated spike rasters generated dichotomized Gaussian model neuron.

title: Function to estimate autocorrelation parameters using dichotomized Gaussian simulations — estimate.autocorr.params
code: estimate.autocorr.params(   neuron_list,   n_trials_per_sim = 300,   n_sims_per_neurons = 100,   bin_count_action = "sum",   max_lag = 0,   A0 = 0.001,   tau0 = 1,   ctol = 1e-08,   max_evals = 500,   use_raw = TRUE )

title: Function to estimate autocorrelation parameters using dichotomized Gaussian simulations — estimate.autocorr.params
text: neuron_list R list neuron objects. n_trials_per_sim Number trials simulate simulation (default: 300). n_sims_per_neurons Number simulations run neuron (default: 100). bin_count_action Method counting spikes bin computing autocorrelation; one "boolean", "mean", "sum" (default: "sum"). A0 Initial guess amplitude parameter exponential decay function (default: 0.001). tau0 Initial guess time constant parameter exponential decay function (default: 1.0). ctol Convergence tolerance fitting exponential decay function (default: 1e-8). max_evals Maximum number evaluations fitting exponential decay function (default: 500). use_raw Logical indicating whether use raw autocorrelation (true) standard centered normalized correlation (false) (default: TRUE).

title: Function to estimate autocorrelation parameters using dichotomized Gaussian simulations — estimate.autocorr.params
text: list containing data frame autocorrelation parameter estimates (one row per simulation), data frame neuron identifiers (one row per neuron), number simulations run per neuron.

title: Import raw kilosort4 data — import.kilo4
text: Base function import raw kilosort4 accompanying stimulus data. function looks csv file stim_data_file looks following files folder_path/kilosort4: spike_positions.npy 2D array giving x y position spike spike_clusters.npy integer giving cluster number spike spike_times.npy sample number spike occurred cluster_group.tsv 2D array giving status cluster (0=noise, 1=MUA, 2=Good, 3=unsorted), hand-curated cluster_info.tsv 2D array giving automatic output kilosort4. file needed cluster_group.tsv data. includeVector.mat MATLAB file giving whether cluster stimulus-responsive (1) (0)

title: Import raw kilosort4 data — import.kilo4
code: import.kilo4(   folder_path,   stim_data_file,   recording_Fq_MATLAB = 30303,   trial_time_start = -100,   trial_time_end = 400,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Import raw kilosort4 data — import.kilo4
text: folder_path Path kilosort4 output files stim_data_file Path stimulus event data file recording_Fq_MATLAB Sampling frequency MATLAB recording trial_time_start Time begin trial (ms), relative stimulus onset trial_time_end Time end trial (ms), relative stimulus onset verbose Print report imported data?

title: Import raw kilosort4 data — import.kilo4
text: list two data frames: spikes (rows spikes) stim (rows stimulus onset times)

title: Load projection into motif — load.projection.into.motif
text: function loads projection schema motif object. Projections define internode connectivity within network built using motif.

title: Load projection into motif — load.projection.into.motif
code: load.projection.into.motif(   motif,   presynaptic_layer,   postsynaptic_layer,   density = NULL,   presynaptic_density = 0.5,   postsynaptic_density = 0.5,   presynaptic_type = "principal",   postsynaptic_type = "principal",   max_col_shift_up = 0,   max_col_shift_down = 0,   connection_strength = 1 )

title: Load projection into motif — load.projection.into.motif
text: motif Motif object load projection. presynaptic_layer Character string giving layer presynaptic neuron, e.g. "L2/3", "L4", "L5", "L6", etc. postsynaptic_layer Character string, vector character strings, giving layer postsynaptic neuron, e.g. "L2/3", "L4", "L5", "L6", etc. density Numeric giving density projection; left NULL, use presynaptic_density postsynaptic_density; set, use value presynaptic_density postsynaptic_density. presynaptic_density Numeric giving density presynaptic neuron type presynaptic layer (e.g., ratio neurons per node, default: 0.5). postsynaptic_density Numeric giving density postsynaptic neuron type postsynaptic layer (e.g., ratio neurons per node, default: 0.5). presynaptic_type Character string giving type presynaptic neuron, e.g. "excitatory", "inhibitory", etc. (default: "principal"). postsynaptic_type Character string giving type postsynaptic neuron, e.g. "excitatory", "inhibitory", etc. (default: "principal"). max_col_shift_up Maximum number columns upwards (increasing columnar indexes) projection can reach (default: 0, positive integer). max_col_shift_down Maximum number columns downwards (decreasing columnar indexes) projection can reach (default: 0, positive integer). connection_strength Numeric giving overall strength projection (default: 1.0).

title: Load projection into motif — load.projection.into.motif
text: updated motif object new projection loaded.

what: Load neuron data from raster file — load.rasters.as.neurons
title: Load neuron data from raster file — load.rasters.as.neurons
text: function loads spike raster data data frame CSV file converts unique cell neuron object. raster data frame must contain columns cell identifier, spike time milliseconds, trial number. Optional metadata columns can also included.

title: Load neuron data from raster file — load.rasters.as.neurons
code: load.rasters.as.neurons(   raster_df,   bin_size = 10,   min_duration = 0,   max_displacement = 1e+09,   sample_rt = 10000,   time_cutoff = Inf )

title: Load neuron data from raster file — load.rasters.as.neurons
text: raster_df Data frame (file name csv importable ), row spike; must columns: cell, time_in_ms, trial; optional columns: recording_name, hemisphere, genotype, sex, region, age. bin_size Size time bins milliseconds (default: 10). min_duration Minimum trial duration milliseconds (default: 0). max_displacement Max displacement trial center milliseconds (default: 1e9, .e., "infinity"). sample_rt Sample rate default unit neuron objects, Hz (default: 1e4). time_cutoff Maximum time (ms) include spikes; spikes occurring time excluded (default: Inf).

title: Load neuron data from raster file — load.rasters.as.neurons
text: list neuron objects, one per unique cell raster data.

title: Initialize network (circuit) motif — new.motif
text: function initializes new motif object specified parameters. Motifs used building networks interconnected neurons. recipes building internode projections within neural network. "columnar", sense repeated across cortical columns.

title: Initialize network (circuit) motif — new.motif
code: new.motif(motif_name = "not_provided")

title: Initialize network (circuit) motif — new.motif
text: motif_name Character string giving name motif (default: "not_provided").

title: Initialize network (circuit) motif — new.motif
text: new motif object.

title: Initialize neuron network — new.network
text: function initializes new network object specified parameters. Networks used simulate two-dimensional cortical patches (layers columns) using Growth Transform dynamical systems.

title: Initialize neuron network — new.network
code: new.network(   network_name = "not_provided",   recording_name = "not_provided",   type = "Growth_Transform",   genotype = "WT",   sex = "not_provided",   hemi = "not_provided",   region = "not_provided",   age = "not_provided",   unit_time = "ms",   unit_sample_rate = "Hz",   unit_potential = "mV",   unit_current = "mA",   unit_conductance = "mS",   unit_distance = "micron",   t_per_bin = 1,   sample_rate = 10000 )

title: Initialize neuron network — new.network
text: network_name Character string giving name network (default: "not_provided"). recording_name Character string giving name recording network based (default: "not_provided"). type Character string giving type network; "Growth_Transform" option available (default: "Growth_Transform"). genotype Character string giving genotype animal modelled network comes, e.g. "WT", "KO", "MECP2", "transgenic", etc. (default: "not_provided"). sex Character string giving sex animal modelled network comes (default: "not_provided"). hemi Character string giving hemisphere animal modelled network comes, e.g. "left", "right" (default: "not_provided"). region Character string giving brain region animal modelled network comes, e.g. "V1", "M1", "CA1", "PFC", etc. (default: "not_provided"). age Character string giving age animal modelled network comes, e.g. "P0", "P7", "P14", "adult", etc. (default: "not_provided"). unit_time Character string giving unit time spike raster recording data model based compared, e.g. "ms", "s", etc. (default: "ms"). unit_sample_rate Character string giving unit sample rate recording data model based compared, e.g. "Hz", "kHz", etc. (default: "Hz"). unit_potential Character string giving unit cell-membrane potential recording data model based compared, e.g. "mV", "uV", etc. (default: "mV"). unit_current Character string giving unit cell current recording data model based compared, e.g. "mA", "uA", etc. (default: "mA"). unit_conductance Character string giving unit axon dendrite conductance recording data model based compared, e.g. "mS", "uS", etc. (default: "mS"). unit_distance Character string giving unit distance axon dendrite measurements model based compared, e.g. "micron", "mm", etc. (default: "micron"). t_per_bin Time (units) per bin, e.g., 1 ms per bin (default: 10.0). sample_rate Sample rate (units), e.g., 1e4 Hz (default: 1e4).

title: Initialize neuron network — new.network
text: new network object.

title: Initialize neuron network — new.network
text: Mathematically, networks points (representing neurons) connected directed edges. Within growth-transform (GT) model framework, edges transconductance values representing synaptic connections neurons. Point types: Points can grouped types, affect behavior connectivity. Within GT model framework, types temporal modulation constants (determining, e.g., whether cell bursts fires singular spikes) valence (excitatory inhibitory). Global structure: Modelling mammalian cortex, networks assumed divide coarse-grained two-dimensional coordinate system layers (rows) columns (columns). point assigned layer-column coordinate (called "node"), local x-y coordinates within node global x-y coordinate within network. Local structure: layer-column coordinate defines "node" containing number points determined layer type. Connections (edges) within node determined local recurrence factor matrix determining transconductance points type. edges called "local". Long-range projections: Connections (edges) points different nodes determined long-range projection motif labelled motif.

title: Initialize neuron — new.neuron
text: function initializes new neuron object specified parameters. neuron objects main tools running correlation analyses spike data.

title: Initialize neuron — new.neuron
code: new.neuron(   id_num = 0,   recording_name = "not_provided",   type = "generic",   genotype = "not_provided",   sex = "not_provided",   hemi = "not_provided",   region = "not_provided",   age = "not_provided",   sim = FALSE,   unit_time = "ms",   unit_sample_rate = "Hz",   unit_data = "mV",   t_per_bin = 10,   sample_rate = 10000 )

title: Initialize neuron — new.neuron
text: id_num Numeric identifier neuron (default: 0). recording_name Recording () neuron based (default: "not_provided"). type Modeled electrophysiology neuron, e.g. "generic", "blackbox" "LIF", "McCullochPitts", "excitatory", "inhibitory", etc. (default: "generic"). genotype Genotype animal, e.g. "WT", "KO", "MECP2", "transgenic", etc. (default: "not_provided"). sex Sex animal (default: "not_provided"). hemi Hemisphere neuron neuron located, e.g. "left", "right" (default: "not_provided"). region Brain region neuron located, e.g. "V1", "M1", "CA1", "PFC", etc. (default: "not_provided"). age Age animal, e.g. "P0", "P7", "P14", "adult", etc. (default: "not_provided"). sim Logical indicating neuron simulated (TRUE) recorded (FALSE) (default: FALSE). unit_time Unit time spike raster recording data, e.g. "ms", "s", etc. (default: "ms"). unit_sample_rate Unit sample rate spike raster recording data, e.g. "Hz", "kHz", etc. (default: "Hz"). unit_data Unit data spike raster recording data, e.g. "mV", "spike", etc. (default: "mV"). t_per_bin Time (units) per bin, e.g., 1 ms per bin (default: 10.0). sample_rate Sample rate (units), e.g., 1e4 Hz (default: 1e4).

title: Initialize neuron — new.neuron
text: new neuron object.

title: Initialize neuron object — new_neuron
text: function initializes new neuron object specified parameters. neuron objects main tools running autocorrelation analyses spike data.

title: Initialize neuron object — new_neuron

title: Initialize neuron object — new_neuron
text: id_num Numeric identifier neuron (default: 0). recording_name Recording () neuron based (default: "not_provided"). type Modeled electrophysiology neuron, e.g. "generic", "blackbox" "LIF", "McCullochPitts", "excitatory", "inhibitory", etc. (default: "generic"). genotype Genotype animal, e.g. "WT", "KO", "MECP2", "transgenic", etc. (default: "not_provided"). sex Sex animal (default: "not_provided"). hemi Hemisphere neuron neuron located, e.g. "left", "right" (default: "not_provided"). region Brain region neuron located, e.g. "V1", "M1", "CA1", "PFC", etc. (default: "not_provided"). age Age animal, e.g. "P0", "P7", "P14", "adult", etc. (default: "not_provided"). sim Logical indicating neuron simulated (TRUE) recorded (FALSE) (default: FALSE). unit_time Unit time spike raster recording data, e.g. "ms", "s", etc. (default: "ms"). unit_sample_rate Unit sample rate spike raster recording data, e.g. "Hz", "kHz", etc. (default: "Hz"). unit_data Unit data spike raster recording data, e.g. "mV", "spike", etc. (default: "mV"). t_per_bin Time (units) per bin, e.g., 1 ms per bin (default: 10.0). sample_rate Sample rate (units), e.g., 1e4 Hz (default: 1e4).

what: Plot network as directed graph — plot.network
title: Plot network as directed graph — plot.network
text: function plots network object directed graph using ggplot2. Nodes represent neurons, directed edges represent connections . plot can customized selecting motif display color edges.

title: Plot network as directed graph — plot.network
code: plot.network(  network,   title = NULL,   plot_motif = "local connections",   edge_color = "pre_type",   cell_color = "layer",   cell_size_factor = 5.0,   arrow_size_factor = 0.5,   return_plot = FALSE )

title: Plot network as directed graph — plot.network
text: network Network object plot. title Title plot (default: "Cortical Patch" network name (provided), plus plot motif name(s)). plot_motif Character string specifying motif plot; options include "local" local connections within node name long-range projection motif (default: "local connections"). edge_color Character string specifying color edges; options include "pre_type" color presynaptic neuron type, "post_type" color postsynaptic neuron type, "motif" color motif type (default: "pre_type"). cell_color Character string specifying color nodes; options include "layer" color layer index "type" color neuron type (default: "layer"). cell_size_factor Numeric value controlling cell size plot scales number cells. return_plot Logical indicating whether return ggplot object (TRUE) print plot directly (FALSE) (default: FALSE). arrow_size Numeric value indicating size arrows representing edges (default: 0.05).

title: Plot network as directed graph — plot.network
text: Either prints plot directly returns ggplot object, depending value return_plot.

title: Function to plot spike raster of neuron — plot.raster
text: nrn Neuron object plot spike raster. plot_title Title plot (default: "Spike raster"). zero_as_onset Logical indicating whether plot vertical line time zero indicate stimulus onset (default: TRUE).

title: Preprocess kilosort4 data — preprocess.kilo4
text: Function preprocess kilosort4 data use neurons package functions.

title: Preprocess kilosort4 data — preprocess.kilo4
code: preprocess.kilo4(   trial_time_start = -100,   trial_time_end = 2020,   recording.folder = "data",   meta_data = NULL,   max_spikes = Inf,   min_spikes = 0,   min_trials = 0,   pure_trials_only = TRUE,   good_cells_only = TRUE,   stim_responsive_only = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Preprocess kilosort4 data — preprocess.kilo4
text: trial_time_start Time begin trial (ms), relative stimulus onset trial_time_end Time end trial (ms), relative stimulus onset recording.folder List paths kilosort4 output folders meta_data Data frame metadata recording (e.g., genotype, hemisphere), one recording per row; row names match recording names columns covariates later analysis max_spikes Maximum number total spikes cell kept min_spikes Minimum number total spikes cell kept min_trials Minimum number trials cell kept pure_trials_only Keep trials overlap? good_cells_only Keep cells marked "good" cluster_group.tsv file? stim_responsive_only Keep cells marked stimulus-responsive cluster_group.tsv file? verbose Print report imported data?

title: Preprocess kilosort4 data — preprocess.kilo4
text: list three elements: spikes data frame one row per spike timeXtrial list matrices rows sample times columns trials, element zero spike time trial, one spike cluster.key data frame one row per neuron

what: Function to process autocorrelation of neuron list — process.autocorr
title: Function to process autocorrelation of neuron list — process.autocorr
text: First estimates autocorrelation neuron list, fits exponential decay function estimated autocorrelation, finally collects returns summary statistics neuron.

title: Function to process autocorrelation of neuron list — process.autocorr
code: process.autocorr(   neuron_list,   bin_count_action = "sum",   max_lag = 0,   A0 = 0.001,   tau0 = 1,   ctol = 1e-08,   max_evals = 500,   check_autofiring_ratio = FALSE,   print_plots = FALSE,   plot_time_cutoff = Inf,   use_raw = TRUE )

title: Function to process autocorrelation of neuron list — process.autocorr
text: neuron_list R list neuron objects. bin_count_action Method counting spikes bin computing autocorrelation; one "boolean", "mean", "sum" (default: "sum"). max_lag Maximum lag (units trial data) compute autocorrelation; 0, uses number time bins neuron's trial data (default: 0). A0 Initial guess amplitude parameter exponential decay function (default: 0.001). tau0 Initial guess time constant parameter exponential decay function (default: 1.0). ctol Convergence tolerance fitting exponential decay function (default: 1e-8). max_evals Maximum number evaluations fitting exponential decay function (default: 500). check_autofiring_ratio Logical indicating whether check assumption autocorrelation values mean firing rate test.sigma.assumption function (default: FALSE). print_plots Logical indicating whether print autocorrelation plots neuron (default: FALSE). plot_time_cutoff Maximum lag (bins) display x-axis plots (default: Inf). use_raw Logical indicating whether use raw autocorrelation (true) standard centered normalized correlation (false) (default: TRUE).

title: Function to process autocorrelation of neuron list — process.autocorr
text: data frame one row per neuron columns lambda (mean spike rate per ms per bin), amplitude (), time constant (tau), bias term, first autocorrelation value, maximum autocorrelation value, mean autocorrelation value, minimum autocorrelation value.

what: Run Spatial Growth-Transform network simulation — run.SGT
title: Run Spatial Growth-Transform network simulation — run.SGT
text: function uses Spatial Growth-Transform (SGT) model run spike simulation given network object specified matrix input currents time. matrix containing spike traces neurons time simulation (neurons rows, sample times columns) saved network object, along vector spike counts neuron network. returned R side list.

title: Run Spatial Growth-Transform network simulation — run.SGT
code: run.SGT(network, stimulus_current_matrix, dt = 0.001)

title: Run Spatial Growth-Transform network simulation — run.SGT
text: network Network object run simulation. stimulus_current_matrix Matrix input currents, rows representing neurons columns representing sample times. dt Time step length unit_time network (default: 1e-3, 1 micosecond time steps).

title: Run Spatial Growth-Transform network simulation — run.SGT
text: List containing following elements: sim_traces Matrix simulated spike traces neurons time (neurons rows, sample times columns). spike_counts Vector spike counts neuron network.

title: Set network structure — set.network.structure
text: function sets structure network object, defining layers, columns, neuron types, local connectivity parameters. also generates local nodes based specified structure.

title: Set network structure — set.network.structure
code: set.network.structure(   network,   neuron_types = c("principal"),   layer_names = c("layer"),   n_layers = 1,   n_columns = 1,   layer_height = 250,   column_width = 130,   layer_separation_factor = 3,   column_separation_factor = 3.5,   neurons_per_node = 30,   recurrence_factors = 0.5,   pruning_threshold_factor = 0.1 )

title: Set network structure — set.network.structure
text: network Network object configure. neuron_types Character vector giving types neurons network, e.g. c("principal", "interneuron"). layer_names Character vector giving names layers network, e.g. c("L2/3", "L4", "L5", "L6"). n_layers Integer giving number layers network. n_columns Integer giving number columns network. layer_height Numeric giving height layer (units specified network creation, default unit microns, default value 250.0). column_width Numeric giving width column (units specified network creation, default unit microns, default value 130.0). layer_separation_factor Numeric giving mean distance layers fraction layer height (default: 3.0). column_separation_factor Numeric giving mean distance columns fraction column width (default: 3.5). neurons_per_node Matrix giving number neurons type per node layer; dimensions must match n_layers (rows) length neuron_types (columns). recurrence_factors List matrices giving local recurrence factors layer; matrix must dimensions matching length neuron_types (rows columns). pruning_threshold_factor Numeric giving factor pruning weak connections within nodes; connections strength factor times maximum connection strength node pruned (default: 0.1). neuron_type_valences Numeric vector giving valences neuron type, e.g. c(1, -1) excitatory inhibitory neurons. neuron_type_temporal_modulation Numeric matrix giving temporal modulation time components (modulation time unit_time network) neuron type: bias, step size, count cutoff (rows neuron types, columns components). example single value vector length three.

title: Set network structure — set.network.structure
text: updated network object specified structure local nodes generated.
